criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: 1-in-1000 base rate, 900x shift, exact formula, three named applications. Quantified and sharp.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs build cleanly. No gaps, no rung duplicates the destination.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Explicitly states formula, normalizing constant role, proportionality.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Nearly all symbols defined on first use. Minor: 'false-positive rate' label without unpacking.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Tree and bar both renderer-executable. Minor leaf layout ambiguity.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Timeline well-ordered. Hook erased before bayes formula occupies same region. Minor right-half crowding.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Two draws, multiple highlights/transforms/writes. Good mix.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: Formula correct. Arithmetic verified. ERROR: payoff says '900x jump from 0.1% to 4.7%' but actual factor is ~47x. Minor deduction since formula and arithmetic are correct; error is in interpretive gloss only.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: Nine beats / 210s averages 23s/beat. Last beat at t=185 leaves 25s closing window.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Proportionality tagline repeated 3 times across t=135, t=185, t=195 plus narration.

topThreeIssues: Payoff and beat at t=150 claim '900x jump from 0.1% to 4.7%' but actual factor is ~47x; correct the arithmetic
Proportionality tagline repeated 3 times; tighten to two instances
'False-positive rate' introduced as informal label for P(E|not-H) before unpacking; brief gloss on first use
summary: High-quality plan with precise destination, well-ordered staircase, fully specified board. One substantive error: posterior-to-prior ratio is ~47x not 900x as stated. Minor redundancy in proportionality tagline. Pipeline-ready aside from arithmetic gloss correction.
